zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha de Vernon於1280年出生在英國爾希布盧可時，她的父親Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook39歲，母親Mary Dacre20歲。她於1295年與Hugh de Venables在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在英國英格蘭爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha de Vernon于1280年出生在英国爾希布盧可时，她的父亲Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook39岁，母亲Mary Dacre20岁。她于1295年与Hugh de Venables在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在英国英格兰爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha de Vernon was born in 1280, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, was 39 and her mother, Mary Dacre, was 20. She married Hugh de Venables in 1295, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1350, in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Elle a épousé Hugh de Venables en 1295, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agatha de Vernon 1280 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook 39 und ihre Mutter Mary Dacre 20. Sie hat 1295 in Cheshire, England Hugh de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha de Vernon è nata il nel 1280 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Mary Dacre, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Venables nel 1295, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Agatha de Vernon(이)가 1280년 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Dacre(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1295년 영국 체실르에서 Hugh de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha de Vernon nasceu em 1280, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mary Dacre, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Venables em 1295, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. ru.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha de Vernon родилась в 1280 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Dacre, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Venables в 1295 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

Se casó con Hugh de Venables en 1295, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1350, en Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
